title: × rapistrosymbrium cabanesii
intro: × Rapistrum symbrium is an annual weed, also known as a wild mustard plant. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of × Rapistrum symbrium include relief from colds, coughs, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of × Rapistrum symbrium include infusions made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, which can be used as a natural remedy for various ailments.
